title: Domain pack claim_schema.yaml loader proof (NM-5 continuation)
problem: Ticket-114 proved evidence_types.yaml drives claim validation allowlists. The creativity pack still has six other declarative files not loaded at runtime. NM-5 requires incremental proof that domain-pack files beyond ontology, aliases, scoring, and evidence types are consumed by the engine.
acceptance_criteria: claim_schema.yaml is loaded for creativity domain pack at runtime.
At least one existing consumer reads pack-defined claim schema extensions instead of hardcoded duplicates.
Temp-pack unit test proves different schema extensions change validation behavior.
Golden and manual synthnote tests remain green in mock mode.
non_goals: No loading all remaining pack files in one ticket.
No applying base_strength priors to confidence scoring.
No cloud providers or live Ollama changes.
No public export or site changes.
rollback_plan: Revert claim_schema loader wiring; restore inline schema constants.
